ismg.criterion: Creating a multimodal presentation in Japanese — Multimodal presentation

descriptors:
comprehension of ideas in three stimulus texts in Japanese related to the present and/or
future choices

comprehension of ideas in two stimulus texts in Japanese related to the present and/or
future choices

some comprehension of ideas in one stimulus text in Japanese related to the present
and/or future choices
The student response does not match any of the descriptors above.
